name: header_design
label: Header Design
inline_help_text: This option determines which design variation of your global header is used for this page. When using the Transparent option, ensure the first section of your page has a darker background on which white text would be legible. Otherwise, use the Solid option.

name: hide_navigation
label: Hide Navigation
help_text: This module allows you to hide the header, footer, and mobile navigation menus. It's suggested that you remove the navigation menus on any Landing Pages that aren't in the navigation menus. If your global header has sticky functionality, enabling this input will disable the sticky functionality on this page as well.

name: disable_sticky_header
label: Disable Sticky Header
help_text: This module allows you to disable the sticky functionality of the global header on this page. This input will not affect the functionality of other sticky elements.

name: disable_hello_bar_on_this_page
label: Disable Hello Bar on this Page
help_text: You can disable the Hello Bar for specific content types within the Hello Bar's global settings which is in the global Header.

name: page_type
label: Page Type
help_text: This is used for internal organization purposes to make it easy to retroactively add global scripts or settings based on page type. You can ignore this on pages with a predetermined template, such as a blog.
